谢谢平台！谢谢作者！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1740112681,"group_id":"7444141717340556312","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5jvoh4yKaCEBjTcB9FghG0=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"325875235292488","user_name":"用户名63532880"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"325875235292488","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7444141717340556312","book_info":{"abstract":"（轻松爆笑+杀伐果断+诸天掠夺，全程高能无虐！）
——开局一个破碗，诸天万界都是我的羊毛！
许无忧穿越了，还绑定了一个不讲武德的【掠夺者系统】。
可这系统有点坑——
薅羊毛能变强，但每次白嫖，都会触发奇葩副作用！
【你白嫖了邻居小姐姐一碗米饭】
副作用：叶小青对你的怨念+1（满10点将化身病娇黑化！）
解除方法：喊一声“漂亮小姐姐”
【你掠夺了某天帝的神兵】
副作用：该天帝对你的仇恨值MAX！
解除方法：？？？（等死吧）
于是，许无忧的日常变成了——
一边疯狂掠夺诸天万界，一边花式化解系统挖的坑！
从喊“姐姐救命”到反向坑杀仙帝，从偷鸡摸狗到硬刚万界至尊……
最后，连系统都慌了：
“宿主，求你别薅了！再薅下去，诸天都要被你薅秃了！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8c11e2b6308f7a24b551871a6b7d66bb","author":"连环刀","author_id":"","book_id":"7444141717340556312","book_name":"掠夺者系统：从薅羊毛到吞噬诸天","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181850","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7444153412767203864","read_count":"322","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"342637"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.4","serial_count":"158","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,无敌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6b25529a6287555b606e6da4e2ca9bea~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779165433&x-signature=m1kDHgthNmLAzy7UzdP9M%2Bu4Qgg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2559274343218894","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"50"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032012371218A21DB4E784830B1155"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9099,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1211},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1
